---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

SUMMARY

A clear description of the feature you would like to see.

MOTIVATION

Why this feature would be useful. What problem does it solve?

PROPOSED SOLUTION

How you think it could work. Include API examples if relevant.

ALTERNATIVES CONSIDERED

Any other approaches you have thought about.

ADDITIONAL CONTEXT

Any other details, references, or screenshots.
